build.buildCommand: npm run server:build && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='server_dist/index.js';let s=fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8');s=s.replace('html = html.replace(/GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID_PLACEHOLDER/g, googleClientId);','html = html.replace(\"GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID_PLACEHOLDER\", googleClientId);');fs.writeFileSync(p,s);"
